title: pleione simplex
intro: Pleione simplex, also known as Chinese orchid or Chinese pinesap, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. The medicinal properties of Pleione simplex include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and calm the nervous system. Pleione simplex can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
